ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: CLI path for Docker or Podman (used to start Redis Stack and the Python worker). Leave as 'docker'/'podman' to auto-detect via PATH and common locations without saving an absolute path (keeps cross-OS sync). Supports ~. Relative paths with separators resolve from your home dir.
ast.target: 用于Docker或Podman的CLI路径（用于启动Redis Stack和Python工作进程）。保留为'docker'/'podman'以通过PATH和常见位置自动检测，无需保存绝对路径（保持跨操作系统同步）。支持~。带分隔符的相对路径从您的主目录解析。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show legacy local interpreter/venv controls. Recommended to keep this disabled.
ast.target: 显示旧版本地解释器/虚拟环境控件。建议保持禁用状态。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Worker runtime is recommended. Enable advanced options to expose local interpreter/venv mode.
ast.target: 推荐使用工作进程运行时。启用高级选项以显示本地解释器/虚拟环境模式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Local mode only: optional path to the Python interpreter used to create or run the plugin env. Leave blank to auto-detect (python3.13/3.12/3.11/3.10/python3/python, or py on Windows). Supports ~. Relative paths with separators resolve from your home dir.
ast.target: 仅限本地模式：用于创建或运行插件环境的Python解释器的可选路径。留空以自动检测（python3.13/3.12/3.11/3.10/python3/python，或Windows上的py）。支持~。带分隔符的相对路径从您的主目录解析。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Local mode: create or update the plugin's python env. Worker mode: managed by docker startup.
ast.target: 本地模式：创建或更新插件的Python环境。工作进程模式：由Docker启动管理。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Local mode only: shared user cache can be reused across vaults; plugin folder keeps a per-vault env.
ast.target: 仅限本地模式：共享用户缓存可在保险库之间重复使用；插件文件夹保留每个保险库的环境。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When starting redis stack, pick a free local port and update the redis URL.
ast.target: 启动Redis Stack时，选择一个空闲的本地端口并更新Redis URL。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional path to store Redis persistence when auto-assign is off. Supports ~. Relative paths with separators resolve from your home dir; use ./ to keep it vault-relative.
ast.target: 当自动分配关闭时，用于存储Redis持久化的可选路径。支持~。带分隔符的相对路径从您的主目录解析；使用./使其相对于保险库。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional docker/podman compose project name when auto-assign is off.
ast.target: 当自动分配关闭时，可选的docker/podman compose项目名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Leave blank to use a per-vault cache under ~/.cache/zotero-redisearch-rag/. Set a path here to override it. Supports ~. Relative paths with separators resolve from your home dir; use ./ to keep it vault-relative.
ast.target: 留空以使用~/.cache/zotero-redisearch-rag/下的每个保险库缓存。在此处设置路径以覆盖它。支持~。带分隔符的相对路径从您的主目录解析；使用./使其相对于保险库。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Requires Docker Desktop running and your vault path shared with Docker. Starts Redis and, in worker mode, the Python worker container.
ast.target: 需要Docker Desktop运行，并且您的保险库路径已与Docker共享。启动Redis，并在工作进程模式下启动Python工作进程容器。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Starts or restarts redis stack (and python worker in worker mode).
ast.target: 启动或重启Redis Stack（以及工作进程模式下的Python工作进程）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Local Zotero API base URL, e.g. HTTP://127.0.0.1:23119/API

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select your local library or a Zotero group library.
ast.target: 选择您的本地库或Zotero群组库。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Zotero Web API base URL for write fallback, e.g. https://api.zotero.org
ast.target: 用于写入回退的Zotero Web API基础URL，例如https://api.zotero.org

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Library type for web API writes.
ast.target: 用于Web API写入的库类型。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Numeric Zotero user/group ID for web API writes.
ast.target: 用于Web API写入的数字Zotero用户/群组ID。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Zotero API key for write fallback (from Zotero.org).
ast.target: 用于写入回退的Zotero API密钥（来自Zotero.org）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Normalize Zotero tags for Obsidian (no spaces, punctuation trimmed).
ast.target: 为Obsidian规范化Zotero标签（无空格，标点符号已修剪）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where exported chat notes are stored (vault-relative).
ast.target: 导出的聊天笔记存储位置（相对于保险库）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When ocr is used, replace the vault PDF with a tesseract text layer (requires copy pdfs into vault).
ast.target: 使用OCR时，用Tesseract文本层替换保险库PDF（需要将PDF复制到保险库中）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Link citations to the Obsidian note when available; otherwise use Zotero deep links.
ast.target: 当可用时，将引文链接到Obsidian笔记；否则使用Zotero深度链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Label shown before the page link in annotation callouts.
ast.target: 在注释标注中页面链接前显示的标签。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Embed image/rect annotations as images in callouts when available.
ast.target: 当可用时，将图像/矩形注释作为图像嵌入标注中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Fetch cached annotation images from a local Zotero companion plugin.
ast.target: 从本地Zotero伴侣插件获取缓存的注释图像。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Local URL for the Zotero companion plugin (loopback only).
ast.target: Zotero伴侣插件的本地URL（仅限回环）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional shared token for the companion endpoint.
ast.target: 伴侣端点的可选共享令牌。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Create and paste a secure token. The generated token is copied to your clipboard. In Zotero, set your Zotero companion plugin token to this value.
ast.target: 创建并粘贴安全令牌。生成的令牌将复制到您的剪贴板。在Zotero中，将您的Zotero伴侣插件令牌设置为此值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: API token for paddleocr-vl / pp-structurev3 endpoints. Get a free API key at
ast.target: 用于paddleocr-vl / pp-structurev3端点的API令牌。在获取免费API密钥

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional override for the paddleocr-vl API endpoint.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: API endpoint for pp-structurev3 (see baidu AI studio docs).
ast.target: pp-structurev3的API端点（参见百度AI Studio文档）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select the ocr engine to use when ocr is required.
ast.target: 选择需要OCR时使用的OCR引擎。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Controls when ocr runs; per-page behavior is configured separately below.
ast.target: 控制OCR何时运行；每页行为在下方单独配置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Force per-page ocr when ocr runs, bypassing layout heuristics; can be slower for multi-column pdfs.
ast.target: 当OCR运行时，强制进行每页OCR，绕过布局启发式；对于多栏PDF可能较慢。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Lower values are stricter; below this threshold the text is treated as low quality.
ast.target: 值越低越严格；低于此阈值的文本被视为低质量。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 删除此已保存的配置文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatic AI cleanup for poor ocr at import. Can be slow/costly.
ast.target: 导入时对低质量OCR进行自动AI清理。可能较慢/成本较高。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select a profile to populate base URL and API key.
ast.target: 选择配置文件以填充基础URL和API密钥。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional API key for the cleanup endpoint.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select a cleanup-capable model from the provider.
ast.target: 从提供商处选择具有清理功能的模型。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically learn the best cleanup mode for the selected provider and model, and reprobe reasoning every 30 days.
ast.target: 自动学习所选提供商和模型的最佳清理模式，并每30天重新探测推理能力。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only run cleanup when chunk quality is below this threshold (0-1).
ast.target: 仅当块质量低于此阈值（0-1）时运行清理。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Skip cleanup for chunks longer than this limit.
ast.target: 跳过长度超过此限制的块的清理。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use the ocr cleanup model to tag chunks before indexing.
ast.target: 使用OCR清理模型在索引前标记块。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 用于聊天请求的兼容端点。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select a chat-capable model from the provider.
ast.target: 从提供商处选择具有聊天功能的模型。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of recent messages to include for conversational continuity (0 disables).
ast.target: 为对话连续性包含的最近消息数量（0表示禁用）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where to open the chat view by default.
ast.target: 默认打开聊天视图的位置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Final number of retrieved chunks to keep before annotations and answer generation.
ast.target: 在生成注释和答案之前保留的最终检索块数量。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use a small planner step that can trigger expansion retry or full-document retrieval before answering.
ast.target: 使用小型规划器步骤，可在回答前触发扩展重试或全文档检索。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum number of planner steps per query.
ast.target: 每个查询的最大规划器步骤数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use the chat model to expand queries before retrieval.
ast.target: 使用聊天模型在检索前扩展查询。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Rewrite chat queries into standalone retrieval queries using recent chat history.
ast.target: 使用最近的聊天历史将聊天查询重写为独立的检索查询。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of expansion variants to request.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Rerank candidates locally with sentence-transformers (downloads model on first use).
ast.target: 使用sentence-transformers在本地重新排序候选项（首次使用时下载模型）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose a multilingual preset, or select custom to edit the model ID.
ast.target: 选择多语言预设，或选择自定义以编辑模型ID。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Retrieve k × n candidates before reranking.
ast.target: 在重新排序前检索k × n个候选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Rank fusion constant for blending lexical and vector results.
ast.target: 用于混合词法和向量结果的排名融合常数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Log the top n rrf-ranked chunks to stderr (0 disables).
ast.target: 将前n个rrf排名的块记录到stderr（0表示禁用）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Limit how many chunks from a single document can appear in retrieval (0 disables).
ast.target: 限制单个文档中可以出现在检索结果中的块数量（0表示禁用）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Switch to local interpreter/venv mode and enable advanced runtime settings.
ast.target: 切换到本地解释器/虚拟环境模式并启用高级运行时设置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Write plugin logs to a file.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where to write the log file. Keep inside the vault.
ast.target: 写入日志文件的位置。请保存在保险库内。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Open the log file or clear it.
ast.target: 打开日志文件或清除它。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Downloads the companion xpi to this plugin folder.
ast.target: 将配套的 xpi 文件下载到此插件文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Launch Zotero and open the add-ons window (tools → add-ons).
ast.target: 启动 Zotero 并打开附加组件窗口（工具 → 附加组件）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 向配套的 /health 端点发送 ping 请求。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Rebuild the redis index from cached chunk JSON files.
ast.target: 从缓存的分块 JSON 文件重建 Redis 索引。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Pulls the configured redis image and force-recreates the redis-stack service.
ast.target: 拉取配置的 Redis 镜像并强制重新创建 redis-stack 服务。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Open the current version splash screen.
ast.target: 打开当前版本的启动画面。

ast.target: 高级 Python 运行时选项

ast.name: text
ast.source: Install the Zotero companion add-on to enable cached image/rect annotations. See tab Maintenance for instructions.

ast.target: 尚无配置文件。请在下方添加一个。

ast.name: text

ast.target: 下载 xpi 文件，然后在 Zotero 中转到工具 → 附加组件 → 从文件安装并重启。
